'''VeerTa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Meerian/Legends|Meerian]] who was the leader of the [[Home Planet Party]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]] in [[45 BBY/Legends|45 BBY]]. She unintentionally aided the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Xanatos]] in his plan to destroy Bandomeer and kill [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]]. She was arrested by [[SonTag]].

{{Char-stub}}
